<!-- GENERATED by cmd/gendocs from internal/inspect/registry.go. Do not edit by hand; run `make docs-gen`. -->

Structural inspectors report corpus-level facts: how files parse and how their frontmatter is shaped.

Inspectors in this family:

- [Walk & Parse]({{< relref "walk-parse.md" >}}) — Count files and report how many parse and carry frontmatter.
- [Frontmatter Shape]({{< relref "frontmatter-shape.md" >}}) — Group files by their frontmatter key-set and report observed field types.
